name: 07 — Stripe Webhook Handler

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ subscription_id: $('Extract Checkout Data').first().json.stripe_subscription_id, lead_id: $('Extract Checkout Data').first().json.lead_id, stripe_customer_id: $('Extract Checkout Data').first().json.stripe_customer_id, stripe_price_id: ($('Fetch Subscription from Stripe').first().json.items && $('Fetch Subscription from Stripe').first().json.items.data && $('Fetch Subscription from Stripe').first().json.items.data[0]) ? $('Fetch Subscription from Stripe').first().json.items.data[0].price.id : null, plan_name: 'starter', niche: 'unknown', amount_cents: $('Extract Checkout Data').first().json.amount_total, interval: 'month', status: 'active', current_period_start: $('Fetch Subscription from Stripe').first().json.current_period_start ? new Date($('Fetch Subscription from Stripe').first().json.current_period_start * 1000).toISOString() : null, current_period_end: $('Fetch Subscription from Stripe').first().json.current_period_end ? new Date($('Fetch Subscription from Stripe').first().json.current_period_end * 1000).toISOString() : null, stripe_payload: $('Fetch Subscription from Stripe').first().json }) }}

data.jsonData: ={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $('Extract Checkout Data').first().json.lead_id, subscription_id: $('Extract Checkout Data').first().json.stripe_subscription_id }) }}

parameters.body:
={{ JSON.stringify({ From: 'billing@mysitehq.com.au', To: $('Route Stripe Event').first().json.data.object.customer_email || 'unknown@unknown.com', Subject: 'Payment failed — action required', HtmlBody: '

Your recent payment failed. Please update your payment method to keep your site live.

Update payment method

', TextBody: 'Your payment failed. Update your payment details to keep your site live: https://billing.stripe.com/p/login/', MessageStream: 'outbound' }) }}

notes: CRITICAL: The Stripe Checkout session must be created with metadata.lead_id = the Preview Factory lead_id, otherwise this workflow cannot link the payment to the lead. Stripe signature verification uses Web Crypto API in the code node. If the n8n version does not support Web Crypto, use the stripe npm package via n8n's community nodes or verify via a separate HTTP call. Set STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET to the webhook signing secret from Stripe Dashboard → Webhooks.
